This Afghan capital is a mile-plus-high city at 5,900 feet with mountains to the east & west
The West Bank, where you'll find Ramallah, is the west bank of this river
Al Dafna & Al Bidda are parks lying on this bay that shares its name with the Qatari capital
The "Ab Fab" star visits Krasnoyarsk on "Joanna Lumley's" this "Adventure", a phrase also preceding "Railroad"
India's Andhra people wanted their own state & have it, this one now about the size of Georgia

This title golfer uses his unusual technique to defeat Shooter McGavin
"I'll make it", says H.S. basketballer Jimmy Chitwood about a shot to win the title in this film & spoiler (not really)--he does
In a 1979 sequel this "Master of Disaster" & "Count of Monte Fisto" goes down, & Rocky Balboa wins the crown
In this film Kurt Russell's Herb Brooks leads the U.S. hockey team to an Olympic gold medal

[IMAGE CLUE]
Daniel LaRusso, played by him, won the 1985 All Valley Under-18 Karate Championship, but he was really mid-20s, so... "The Karate Man"?
In the 1950s a Procter & Gamble employee gave his lavish attention to coming up with this disposable diaper & it launched in 1961
The bilingual book "Besos for Baby" teaches tots Spanish words like besos, meaning these
This subsidiary of Mattel made up of 2 last names sells every kind of toy, including the kitchen sink
Give your baby a good night's sleep with this type of machine, or just read the same-named Don DeLillo novel
Buy the tot a plush baby JJ, a character from this YouTube show with a fruit in its name
Amendments to bills not relevant to the legislation are deemed these, like passengers in cars or people on horseback
Nonprofits that spend to influence elections don't need to disclose donors & are thereby using this "money"
This agricultural term for a political movement involving the common person also just means basic or foundational
Hellenic & Long Island Sound are 2 of these smaller groups of legislators that meet to promote a common agenda
It's a bird, it's a plane, no, it's this specified level of support needed to pass a vote, usually 3/5 in the Senate
A deep-dish fruit pie with no bottom crust, or a shoemaker
To go on complaining about something, or a big freshwater fish that can live for nearly 50 years
An unbranded range animal, or a politician who doesn't toe the party line
A bent posture, or where Hannah & her besties sometimes hung out on "Girls"
It means eagerly hopeful or related to blood

Jazz Age icon Josephine Baker came to stardom during the exuberant decade known by this nickname
The late 1600s & early 1700s in this country are known as its Petrine era
The transition between the Stone Age & this other prehistoric era is sometimes called the Chalcolithic, or "copper-stone"
Historians use "the   long 19th century" to refer to the 125-year period between the starts of these 2 European  cataclysms
questions.answer: the French Revolution & World War I

questions.clue: In 1644 China's Ming dynasty was succeeded by this one that rhymes with Ming also called the Manchu

final.clue: The 4-syllable name of this city is almost identical to its namesake town in Spain, except that the Spanish one has an extra "R"

questions.clue: Hippy, Trippy & Moby Grape-y, an exhibit of '60s work at the Portland Art Museum has this word before "Rock Posters" in its title
A classic travel poster is Paul Kirnig's from the 1930s for the Austrian Tourist Board showing this kind of athlete

The Federal Art Project of this New Deal agency produced thousands of posters from inspiring to adorable
Bill Gold put Bogie on the "Casablanca" poster & almost 70 years later put Leo DiCaprio on the poster for this FBIopic
A 19th c. circus poster gained fame when John Lennon titled a song from some of its words, "Being For the Benefit of" him
Hemolytic, iron-deficiency & pernicious are just 3 types of this blood disorder
This condition is a symptom of yellow fever & the source of its name
This disease is the increase in pressure in the eye due to blockage of the aqueous humor
The name of this disease means "hard skin", but it can also affect internal organs
PCOS is short for this syndrome that may interfere with a woman's menstrual cycle
Bungee jumping is one activity that will give you this type of "rush"
A November 2024 outbreak of this was linked to cucumbers, causing a recall
This synonym for surrender comes from Latin for "little head"
How perfect that this word for a solid figure with 10 faces has 10 letters
For the title of a memoir, Gore Vidal used this fancy word for a manuscript in which layers of writing are superimposed
Gifts are 100% deductible as this U.N. agency is "relentlessly pursuing a better world for every child"
Over 400,000 die of this preventable disease every year, with 70% being kids under 5; "Against" it buys $2 nets that can save those lives
Sarah McLachlan said her incredibly sad ads for this worthy charity are "brutal" (oof yes) but that's to "bring the wallet out" (please do!)
Each year this organization founded in 1944 awards scholarships worth more than $65 million as it aids 37 HBCUs
Founded by veterans & friends in 2003, WWP, short for this, says "the greatest casualty is being forgotten"

This sister of the princess of Wales has three kids, just like Kate
Soldiers crave dry these; enter F.P. Nightingale, sis of Florence, who said a batch of knitted ones was "nearly the death of me"

Lucy Payne, sister of this beloved first lady, married George Washington--not the first pres. but his out-of-control nephew

This French family produced more than one skilled female artist; here's Edma's portrait of her sister, Berthe
This title guy said, "Yond Cassius has a lean and hungry look... such men are dangerous"; he should have listened to his instincts
The title of this play is fulfilled in Act V, scene 3, when Helena finally gets her Bertram
It took Shakespeare 3 plays to tell the story of this king from his boyhood to his murder in the Tower
Somewhat ironically, Autolycus sings about daffodils, "the sweet o' the year" & "summer songs" in this play
Shakespeare didn't print his plays but did shepherd some of his poems through printing, including this one about 2 mythical beauties
